modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble with uploading and scheduling content in Scala Content Player

full_description_text: I am trying to upload some content to the Scala thing, but it’s not working. I thought I could just schedule it after uploading, but I can’t find the right buttons or something. It’s really confusing, and I’m not sure if I’m doing it right. Can someone help me figure out how to make this work?
short_description: Trouble with uploading and scheduling content in Scala Content Player
description: I am trying to upload some content to the Scala thing, but it’s not working. I thought I could just schedule it after uploading, but I can’t find the right buttons or something.
